sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16715" key="a)/stutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄστῡτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">στύω</etym>) <sense id="n16715.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impotent,</tr_> paratrag. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄστυλος</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0518.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenarch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
